meaning: n.(文学)床,睡椅 v.(用语言)表达
examples: She slipped out of the jacket and tossed it on the couch.
We were sitting on the couch in the living room watching TV.
Linda lay face down on a living room couch, nibbling popcorn.
Cruise lost his cool on Oprah's couch, and it's unclear if he can get it back.
This is a man who left his couch and fast-food diet to start racing ultra-triathlons.
